name: cloversec-ctf-forexample
description: CloverSec CTF collection, conversion, writeup, archive, review, and Hub submission workflows for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: CTF 收集、构建、手册、归档和 Hub 提交流程
interface.longDescription: CloverSec CTF For Example packages Codex skills for workflow task intake, contest research, challenge resource classification, container inference, Docker validation, asset collection, writeup drafting, archive packaging, quality review, Hub submission preparation, post-review retagging, and final reporting. Version 0.3.3 adds manual quality review, Hub draft packages, Hub review tracking, image naming plans, archive preview, manifest.lock.json, confirmation requests, batch status reports, failure_cases.jsonl, stage notifications, visible-content evidence import for blocked pages, and exact skill/MCP ID guidance. Internal xlsx and Yuque outputs must keep the complete Flag field.
defaultPrompt: 完整 Flag 必须写入 xlsx/语雀字段；公开报告只写状态和 hash。
Hub 只生成草稿、上传清单、浏览器计划和审核状态；不自动最终提交。
输出 ID 必须精确，不加 skill、mcp__、tool 前缀；完整 ID 表见 agent-roles.json。
